title: Snell's law refraction and critical angle
instruction: Implement snell_refract and critical_angle in snell.py. snell_refract(n1, n2, theta1_deg) returns the transmission angle in degrees using n1*sin(theta1)=n2*sin(theta2). Angles are from the surface normal, in degrees. If total internal reflection occurs, return None. critical_angle(n1, n2) returns the critical incidence angle in degrees for light from medium n1 into n2 when n1>n2; if n1<=n2 return None. Raise ValueError for non-positive indices or incidence angles outside [0, 90].
difficulty_rationale: Unit conversions and TIR branch; easy to confuse degrees/radians or critical-angle domain.
